ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., general, primary) */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date of early voting */,
  "absentee_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of absentee voting */,
  "absentee_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date of absentee voting */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method of voting (e.g., in-person, mail-in, electronic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* Type of the district (e.g., precinct, county) */,
  "district_type_subheading" TEXT /* Subheading for the district type */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total registered voters in the district */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "geographic_area" REAL /* Geographic area of the district (e.g., square miles) */,
  "registered_voters_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the district population that is registered to vote */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the district was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the district information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contests" (
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contest */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated election */,
  "ballot_title" TEXT /* Title of the ballot for the contest */,
  "ballots_counted" INTEGER /* Number of ballots counted for the contest */,
  "candidate_count" INTEGER /* Total number of candidates in the contest */,
  "contest_status" TEXT /* Status of the contest (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "contest_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the contest */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method of voting for this contest */,
  "early_voting_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicates if early voting is allowed for this contest */,
  "absentee_voting_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicates if absentee voting is allowed for this contest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contests_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated contest */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_preference" TEXT /* Party preference of the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Total votes received by the candidate */,
  "percent_votes" REAL /* Percent of total votes received */,
  "candidate_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  "candidate_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's photo */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's website */,
  "campaign_funds_raised" REAL /* Amount of funds raised by the candidate */,
  "campaign_funds_spent" REAL /* Amount of funds spent by the candidate */,
  "is_incumbent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "candidate_status" TEXT /* Status of the candidate (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated district */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated election */,
  "ballots_counted" INTEGER /* Number of ballots counted */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "percent_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "early_voting_turnout" INTEGER /* Number of early votes */,
  "absentee_voting_turnout" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes */,
  "in_person_voting_turnout" INTEGER /* Number of in-person votes */,
  "turnout_description" TEXT /* Description of the turnout (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., election official, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the EMS */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, data modification) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., city, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated election */,
  "total_ballots_counted" INTEGER /* Total number of ballots counted in the election */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the election */,
  "early_voting_results" INTEGER /* Number of early votes */,
  "absentee_voting_results" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes */,
  "in_person_voting_results" INTEGER /* Number of in-person votes */,
  "total_valid_ballots" INTEGER /* Total number of valid ballots */,
  "total_invalid_ballots" INTEGER /* Total number of invalid ballots */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party preference record */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated contest */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes received by the party in the contest */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the party */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  "party_website" TEXT /* URL of the party's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_preferences_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballots" (
  "ballot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballot */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated district */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated election */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contest on the ballot */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate selected */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ballot is valid or not */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voter who cast the ballot */,
  "ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of ballot (e.g., early, absentee, in-person) */,
  "ballot_status" TEXT /* Status of the ballot (e.g., counted, rejected) */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the ballot is invalid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* Who sent the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
